creator: mjy@pobox.com
text:
The kaffe virtual machine port is completely unuseable since the virtual machine fails to execute
any java programs.

How-To-Repeat: 1) Install /usr/ports/java/kaffe port (1.0.5)
2) cd /usr/ports/java/kaffe/work/kaffe-1.0.5/test/regression
   make check
   
   or try any other java programs
